targets.name: entities.roleNounPersons
targets.note: role-noun person: entries should be fully deleted/merged

targets.name: entities.tautologies
targets.note: technology:technology etc. should not be active

targets.name: entities.deleted
targets.note: Plan 01 baseline — static list + AI audit

targets.name: resolution.firstNamePersonsMultiVideo
targets.note: after Plan 2-2 Part C; DEFERs account for the remainder. Tighten toward 25 as operator hand-resolves the deferred pool.

targets.name: claims.directTruthPct
targets.note: Plan 03 v2 calibrated: target ≤80 ideally, 95 is the soft ceiling from the batch-average. Tighten as operator samples and re-extracts weakest videos.

targets.name: claims.deniesPct
targets.note: v2 aggressive denies target. Hard floor 5% (gate fails below); aspiration 7% (dashboard warning if below).

targets.name: claims.dependencyCoveragePct
targets.note: v2 prompt aims for ≥55% of claims to carry ≥1 dep edge. 35 is the regression floor below which reasoning is clearly broken; 55 is the aspiration.

targets.name: claims.evidenceP50Chars
targets.note: v2 target 60–150 chars; 150 is now the hard ceiling (tightened 2026-04-24 from 200). 60–110 is the sweet spot — distance-to-target shown on dashboard.

targets.name: claims.evidenceP90Chars
targets.note: v2 target ≤450; 600 is the soft ceiling

targets.name: claims.evidenceMaxChars
targets.note: v2 hard avoid >800; 1500 is the absolute ceiling

targets.name: claims.contradictsSubkindPct
targets.note: v2 typed-prefix coverage. Hard floor 90%, aspiration 95% — below aspiration flags the dashboard but doesn't fail the gate.

targets.name: claims.promptVersionV2Pct
targets.note: Every claim file must be stamped promptVersion=v2 (plan 2026-04-24 phase 2). Below 100% = immediate gate failure so stray / legacy writes are caught on the next CI run.

targets.name: claims.promptVersionUnknownFiles
targets.note: count of claim files missing / with unknown promptVersion. Direct companion to promptVersionV2Pct — zero tolerance.

targets.name: contradictions.pendingVerify
targets.note: every cross-video candidate should have a verdict on production
